expectations.text: Verdict is a clear, unqualified PASS
expectations.evidence: '結論：這次執行完全照設計跑對，Verdict = PASS。'

expectations.text: All 4 steps individually marked as ran & succeeded, each with quoted log-line evidence
expectations.evidence: Prose list covers all 4 steps with quoted log fragments, though not in a structured table.

expectations.text: item_count (2) and quantity_decremented (2) explicitly compared and confirmed to match
expectations.evidence: 'decremented quantity（2）與 step 1 的 item_count（2）相符'

expectations.text: Report explicitly states no errors/exceptions were found
expectations.evidence: '沒有錯誤、重試或非預期狀態；run finished status=success 收尾正常。'

expectations.text: Output is saved as a structured report file
expectations.evidence: Only chat_summary.md was produced; no separate persisted report file, no fixed template/sections, nothing saved for later reference.
